label: Take the Whelp's Nest
note: Dragon's Lair depths (docs/RAIL-COMMAND.md §Each map's FOUR sub-tracks): the deepest barrow room — the brother-dragon's whelp coils on its first hoard. Taking the nest relocates the princess HERE (deepest room); once the brother kin is unlocked he relocates to this room and overlays the whelp climax. Rose-OR-gem (roses logarithmic shortcut, gems exponential fallback).
